name: 閨蜜型守護者（男性）
description: Dan與Jessica作為男主身邊的朋友圈，既是助攻也是情報站。Dan多次用計促成男女主見面，Jessica主動說明與男主無戀愛關係消除女主誤會。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: She is not Ryan's girlfriend. / Andrea, many people are around him, but honestly, few of them truly care about him. After you left back then, he was being depressed for a while. / My job here is done, buddy.
examples.context: Dan與Jessica作為男主身邊的朋友圈，既是助攻也是情報站。Dan多次用計促成男女主見面，Jessica主動說明與男主無戀愛關係消除女主誤會。
